SEARCH
Module UniversitySystem
Package model.users

Class Teacher

java.lang.Object
model.users.User
model.users.Employee
model.users.Teacher
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, model.observer.Observer
public class Teacher extends model.users.Employee implements Serializable
Represents a teacher in the university system. A teacher can manage courses, put marks, generate reports, write recommendation letters, send complaints, and participate in research activities. Inherits employee functionality from Employee.
Version:
1.0
Author:
Sabina
See Also:

      public Teacher(int id, String login, String password, String firstName, String lastName, model.enums.TeacherType position)

      id - system user id
      login - teacher login
      password - teacher password

      lastName - teacher last name
      position - teacher academic position
